title: cordia guazumifolia
intro: Cordia guazumifolia, also known as the Mexican plum or Guazumifolia, is a deciduous tree native to Mexico and parts of Central America, belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cordia guazumifolia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in folk medicine.
